title: Double Character Trouble
hints: Use a stack to efficiently remove consecutive identical pairs.
For each character in the string:
- If the stack is empty, push the character.
- If the stack is not empty, check if the top equals the current character.
- If they match, pop from the stack (removing the pair).
- If they don't match, push the current character.
After processing all characters, build the result string from the remaining stack elements.
